suggestions.title: Prevent false positives from pre-existing blobs
suggestions.recommendation: Verify the blob observed by polling was created or updated by the current invocation by checking blob last_modified against invocation start time.

suggestions.title: Reduce midnight UTC flakiness in date-based blob lookup
suggestions.recommendation: Poll candidate blob names derived from both pre-invoke and post-invoke UTC dates to handle day rollover during execution.

suggestions.title: Assert required container path explicitly
suggestions.recommendation: Assert container is exactly 'yankees-roster' so QA-02 validates the specified path.
